THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT COHEN, ELENA $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $460.00, CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF PANFILO ARMAS AND AGAINST ELENA COHEN IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00.
